gaps_union: Detailed description of processing activities (subject matter, nature, purpose, categories of data subjects, types of personal data, and duration of processing)
Vendor obligation to maintain records of processing activities as required by applicable law (e.g., GDPR Article 30)
Notification to Customer of legally binding requests for disclosure of personal data (e.g., subpoenas, law enforcement access) unless prohibited by law
Processor's obligation to maintain records of processing activities
Notification of government or law enforcement access requests for personal data
Contractual safeguards for special categories of personal data (sensitive data)
Notification of government requests for personal data
Vendor obligation to comply with applicable data protection laws
